chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: then you just use the height attribute.  Now remove the width one here.  So its height will be 230 pixels,  and as much as it can go in width,  it will go.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: It will be automatically adjusted.  Now see,  it was automatically adjusted in width.  And in height, it took this.  Now what happens is that

chunks.text: width and height can be adjusted through CSS.  And we will see in the CSS section,  that why should we always set this width and height?  We should always set one thing from width and height.  Such that,

chunks.text: Now we will talk about tables in HTML.  Table tag is very useful in HTML.  What happens with table tag?  I will tell you.  You get to see a table from table tag.

chunks.text: what does row span mean?  How many rows will be spanned by your TD?  For example,  let's say I write here,  I want SAM and programmer,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I will show you.  Something like this.  So it took the place of this whole column.  Okay?  So the call span means,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: how many columns will be spanned.  By default, only one cell will be spanned.  But sometimes one cell,  two columns will be spanned.  To demonstrate this,

chunks.text: And I am going to name this style sheet,  style.css.  So in style.css,  and you don't need to understand CSS now.  I will tell you already.

chunks.text: how it works.  But for now,  you understand that I have put this,  to explain you.  So I said,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: it looks like this.  The caption comes up.  You will see the employee details like this.  Along with that,  you can also give header and footer.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Something like this,  my table content will come.  As you can see.  And after this,  if I write T foot here,

chunks.text: So it will be a better format.  Assume that I want to put this kind of TR,  and I want to group it in T foot.  So this is just a way to group.  That is, I have put it inside T foot.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And now we will talk about the list here.  List is very important in HTML.  Because we will use the list a lot.  There are three types of lists in HTML.  One is ordered list,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: one is unordered list,  and one is definition list.  The most used are unordered and ordered list.  First, let's look at the unordered list.  Whenever we want,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: that we have unordered data.  Like I write ul here.  So as soon as I write ul here,  it means that unordered list.  I can write li in it.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And I can write Harry.  And after that I can write Rohan.  Okay?  And after that I can write Shubham.  Okay?

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So when I write Harry, Rohan, Shubham here,  then when I write ul,  it will come like this.  This is unordered list.  See, Harry, Rohan, Shubham came here.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: They have no order.  There is no 1, 2, 3, 4 in it.  But if I want it to be ordered,  then I can write this thing with the help of ol.  So if I make its opening closing tag ol

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: and keep the rest the same,  then it will be ordered list.  Okay?  So here it will come 1, 2, 3.  You can do this 1, 2, 3 with ABC.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: You can do capital ABC.  You can also do Roman numbers.  You can also do it with the help of CSS.  There are other ways to do it.  You can see here

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: in this image  that if you align it in ul,  then it will come like this.  You can see in this image  if you align it in ol,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: then it will be 1, 2, 3.  This is an example of ordered list.  And this is an example of definition list.  Definition list is very less used.  It is previewed like this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Here, first I have put a heading  and then I have written dl.  dl means definition list.  After this dt and then dd.  So here the definition term is there

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: and then the definition of its definition is there.  So it comes like this.  And you can also change it with CSS.  It is very less used.  But you should know about it

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: for interviews.  The interviewer asks  what is a definition list?  So this kind of code  is previewed like this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I am also not showing it by writing  for the sake of time.  But try it out.  Okay?  And here first of all

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: we will see the unordered list.  I have told you about unordered list.  It is very simple and straightforward.  You can customize its bullet points  by using type attribute.

chunks.text: Like if I square type here.  I will say here type is equal to  and let's say I write here square.  Okay?  So I have written type is equal to

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: square in ul.  So it has appeared like a square.  Similarly, I can circle  the type in ul.  I can square it.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I can disc it.  Disc is by default.  That means the bullet is by default.  Okay?  I can square it.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I can circle it.  Okay?  Along with that,  you can add any other list items  in the list items.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Now let's see the ordered list  a little more closely.  In the ordered list,  if you write li here,  it will come like this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: 1, 2, 3.  But you can use  type is equal to i.  When you use type is equal to i,  then you will get uppercase roman numbers.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: If you type is equal to small i,  then you will get lowercase roman numbers.  Type is equal to 1 is by default.  You don't need to do this.  If you type small a,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
